productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Grey Striped Shirt
description: Style NoteThis impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with formal trousers and leather shoes for that sharp, suave look. Product DetailsDark grey and white vertical striped shirt, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, curved hemline, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a patch pocket on the left chest with an internal concealed pocketMaterial and Care60% polyester and 40% cottonMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry in shade Use warm iron Size and Fit Indigo Nation's Edgy fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
